prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 1049→800→1162→1284→3081，2021–2024 年位次在 800–1284 间窄幅波动，2025 年大幅后移至 3081 名，近一年后移约 1797 名，反映出该校在江苏物理类录取竞争格局发生明显变化；2021–2025 年该校在江苏物理类招生计划均为 16 人，保持稳定；2026 年计划扩至 26 人，较 2025 年增加 10 人，增幅达 62.5%，扩招幅度较大，将显著缓解竞争压力，使录取位次趋于后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 浙江大学医学院依托浙江大学（985、211、双一流，软科主榜第 3 名），属国内顶尖高校层次，医学学科实力雄厚，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026 年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及学术不端与校园安全事件，但整体关注度一般；抖音热度方面，浙江大学综合排名第 14（高热），医学类专业关注度持续较高；历史投档异常记录中未见该校在江苏有明显断档信号；临床医学（A）、基础医学（A-）、药学（A+）等学科实力突 出，与招生专业（临床医学、口腔医学、医学试验班）高度对应，对考生报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学 2024 年热度指数 70.19（推荐），口腔医学 72.31（推荐），医学类专业持续高热；江苏物理类考生 2021 年 16.6 万→2025 年 26.1 万持续增长，2026 年估算约 38 万（较 2025 年增约 45.7%），考生规模大幅扩大将加剧整体竞争；浙江大学医学院位于浙江杭州，与江苏相邻，地域偏好明显；该校在江苏招生占 比从 2021 年 5.7% 升至 2025 年 7.6%，对江苏考生重视程度持续提升。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年位次大幅后移的走势、2026 年计划扩招 62.5% 的缓解效应、江苏物理类考生规模增长约 45.7% 的竞争加剧、以及医学类专业持续高热的社会热度，扩招幅度大于考生增幅，预计 2026 年最低位次约 4266 名，区间 3766–4766 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）
- 口腔医学（5+3一体化）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 临床医学（在校本部学习）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 医学试验班类（临床医学、口腔医学）
- 医学试验班（竺可桢学院巴德年医学班）（临床医学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 3766–4766 名内，建议以二档五年制临床医学为主攻方向、一档 5+3 一体化专业作为冲刺、三档大类/试验班作为稳妥保底；位次明显优于区间下限可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 1049→800→1162→1284→3081. From 2021 to 2024, the ranking fluctuated narrowly between 800 and 1284, but in 2025 it significantly dropped to 3081, a decline of about 1797 places in one year, reflecting a notable change in the admission competition landscape for this university in Jiangsu's Physics Category. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plan for this university in Jiangsu's Physics Category remained stable at 16 students. In 2026, the plan expands to 26 students, an increase of 10 students compared to 2025, a growth rate of 62.5%. This substantial expansion will significantly alleviate competition pressure, causing the admission ranking to trend downward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhejiang University School of Medicine, affiliated with Zhejiang University (a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked 3rd on the Soft Science main list), is among the top-tier universities in China, with strong medical disciplines that are highly attractive to top-scoring students. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct and campus safety incidents, but overall attention is moderate. In terms of Douyin popularity, Zhejiang University ranks 14th (high heat), and medical majors continue to receive high attention. There are no clear signs of admission gaps for this university in Jiangsu in historical abnormal application records. The strengths of disciplines such as Clinical Medicine (A), Basic Medicine (A-), and Pharmacy (A+) are outstanding, closely matching the admission majors (Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Medical Experimental Class), which strongly attract applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity index for Clinical Medicine was 70.19 (recommended), and for Stomatology it was 72.31 (recommended), indicating sustained high heat for medical majors. The number of Physics Category examinees in Jiangsu grew from 166,000 in 2021 to 261,000 in 2025, with an estimated 380,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 45.7% compared to 2025). This significant expansion in the examinee pool will intensify overall competition. Zhejiang University School of Medicine is located in Hangzhou, Zhejiang, adjacent to Jiangsu, with a clear regional preference. The proportion of enrollment from Jiangsu increased from 5.7% in 2021 to 7.6% in 2025, reflecting a continuously growing emphasis on Jiangsu examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant downward trend in rankings in 2025, the mitigating effect of a 62.5% enrollment expansion in 2026, the intensifying competition due to a 45.7% increase in Jiangsu's Physics Category examinee pool, and the sustained high social heat for medical majors, the expansion rate exceeds the examinee growth rate. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be approximately 4266, with a range of 3766 to 4766.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Stomatology (5+3 Integrated Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Clinical Medicine (studying at the main campus).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Medical Experimental Class (Clinical Medicine, Stomatology)
- Medical Experimental Class (Chu Kochen Honors College, Bade Nian Medical Class) (Clinical Medicine).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3766–4766, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 five-year Clinical Medicine as the main direction, use Tier 1 5+3 integrated programs as a reach, and Tier 3 major categories/experimental classes as a safe backup. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range, prioritize aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors.
